dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 15 - Development Standards (+ Volume 2 Appendix 3 density/height, Appendix 5 parking)
portal: dublincity.ie (adopted plan HTML + Volume 2 Appendices PDF); consult.dublincity.ie hosted the draft
fetch_method: curl.exe of adopted Ch.15 sub-section HTML pages + Volume 2 Appendices PDF (pdftotext). WebFetch was 403-blocked on dublincity.ie.
notes: Chapter 15 (Written Statement) gives residential open-space (10%/25%), private open space (10 sqm/bedspace), apartment floor areas (37/45/73/90 sqm), unit mix, childcare (1 per 75 dwellings), play sizes, separation (~22m), EIA/AA/EcIA triggers. Density/height/plot-ratio/site-coverage (Appendix 3) and zonal MAX car parking + cycle parking (Appendix 5) were SUBSEQUENTLY pulled from the adopted Volume 2 Appendices PDF and added 2026-06-14 - Dublin now fully captured. Appendix 3: 200-300 uph, 4-8 storeys, plot ratio 1.0-3.0 by area; Appendix 5: Parking Zones 1-3, housing 1 per 4 / 1 per 2 dwellings.
